revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.comment: =記念日・年中行事= 朔旦冬至

revision.text:
{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月1日'''は[[旧暦]][[11月 (旧暦)|11月]]の1日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[皇極天皇]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[643年]][[12月16日]]） - [[山背大兄王]]が[[蘇我入鹿]]に襲われ自害 * [[長保]]元年（ユリウス暦[[999年]][[12月11日]]） - [[藤原道長]]の娘・[[藤原彰子|彰子]]が入内 * [[文久]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1863年]][[12月11日]]） - [[薩摩藩]]が英公使に10万ドルを払い[[生麦事件]]が解決
== 誕生日 == * [[建久]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1195年]][[12月4日]]） - [[土御門天皇]]、83代[[天皇]]（+ [[1231年]]） * [[建治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1275年]][[11月19日]]） - [[夢窓疎石]]、[[臨済宗]]の僧（+ [[1351年]]） * [[弘化]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1847年]][[12月8日]]） - [[中江兆民]]、思想家（+ [[1901年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[皇極天皇]]2年（ユリウス暦[[643年]][[12月16日]]） - [[山背大兄王]]、皇族・[[聖徳太子]]の子
== 記念日・年中行事 == * 朔旦冬至（この日が[[冬至]]の場合）
{{旧暦360日}} *前日[[10月30日 (旧暦)|10月30日]] 翌日[[11月2日 (旧暦)|11月2日]] - 前月[[10月1日 (旧暦)|10月1日]] 翌月[[12月1日 (旧暦)|12月1日]] *新暦[[11月1日]]
{{stub}}

== 忌日 == * [[大暦]]10年（[[776年]]） - {{仮リンク|新平公主|zh|新平公主 (唐朝)}}、[[玄宗 (唐)|玄宗]]の娘。

--> == Events == * [[長保]]元年（ユリウス暦[[999年]][[12月11日]]） - [[藤原道長]]の娘・[[藤原彰子|彰子]]が入内{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[文久]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1863年]][[12月11日]]） - [[薩摩藩]]が英公使に10万ドルを払い[[生麦事件]]が解決{{要出典|date=2021-03}}
== Births == * [[永禄]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1561年]][[12月7日]]） - [[吉川広家]]、[[周防国]][[岩国領]]の初代領主（+ [[1625年]]） * [[建治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1275年]][[11月19日]]） - [[夢窓疎石]]、[[臨済宗]]の僧（+ [[1351年]]） * [[弘化]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1847年]][[12月8日]]） - [[中江兆民]]、思想家（+ [[1901年]]）
== Deaths == * [[大暦]]10年（[[776年]]） - {{仮リンク|新平公主|zh|新平公主 (唐朝)}}、[[玄宗 (唐)|玄宗]]の娘。
== Commemorations == * 朔旦冬至（この日が[[冬至]]の場合）
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|10|30|11|2|10|1|12|11|1101}} ※ただし、[[小の月]]の前日は[[10月29日 (旧暦)|10月29日]]。

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * [[長保]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[999]][[12月11日]]） - [[藤原道長]]の娘・[[藤原彰子|彰子]]が入内{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[文久]]3rd year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1863]][[12月11日]]） - [[薩摩藩]]が英公使に10万ドルを払い[[生麦事件]]が解決{{要出典|date=2021-03}}
== Births == * [[永禄]]4th year（ユリウス暦[[1561]][[12月7日]]） - [[吉川広家]]、[[周防国]][[岩国領]]の初代領主（+ [[1625]]） * [[建治]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1275]][[11月19日]]） - [[夢窓疎石]]、[[臨済宗]]の僧（+ [[1351]]） * [[弘化]]4th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1847]][[12月8日]]） - [[中江兆民]]、思想家（+ [[1901]]）
== Deaths == * [[大暦]]10th year（[[776]]） - {{仮リンク|新平公主|zh|新平公主 (唐朝)}}、[[玄宗 (唐)|玄宗]]の娘。
== Commemorations == * 朔旦冬至（この日が[[冬至]]の場合）

revision.text:
[[sn:November 1 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 1일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月1日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 1일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初一]] [[zh:十一月初一]] [[en:draft:November 1 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Chōhō|ja|長保}}1st year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[999]][[12月11日]]） - [[藤原道長]]の娘・[[藤原彰子|彰子]]が入内{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}}3rd year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1863]][[12月11日]]） - [[薩摩藩]]が英公使に10万ドルを払い[[生麦事件]]が解決{{要出典|date=2021-03}}
== Births == * [[永禄]]4th year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1561]][[12月7日]]） - [[吉川広家]]、[[周防国]][[岩国領]]の初代領主（+ [[1625]]） * [[建治]]1st year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1275]][[11月19日]]） - [[夢窓疎石]]、[[臨済宗]]の僧（+ [[1351]]） * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}}4th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1847]][[12月8日]]） - [[中江兆民]]、思想家（+ [[1901]]）
== Deaths == * [[大暦]]10th year（[[776]]） - {{仮リンク|新平公主|zh|新平公主 (唐朝)}}、[[玄宗 (唐)|玄宗]]の娘。
== Commemorations == * 朔旦冬至（この日が[[冬至]]の場合）
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|30|11|2|10|1|12|11|1101}} [[Category:removing this]][[sn:10月29日 (旧暦)|10月29日]]。

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Chōhō|ja|長保}}1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[999]][[12月11日]]） - [[藤原道長]]の娘・[[藤原彰子|彰子]]が入内{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}}3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]][[12月11日]]） - [[薩摩藩]]が英公使に10万ドルを払い[[生麦事件]]が解決{{要出典|date=2021-03}}
== Births == * [[永禄]]4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1561]][[12月7日]]） - [[吉川広家]]、[[周防国]][[岩国領]]の初代領主（+ [[1625]]） * [[建治]]1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1275]][[11月19日]]） - [[夢窓疎石]]、[[臨済宗]]の僧（+ [[1351]]） * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}}4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1847]][[12月8日]]） - [[中江兆民]]、思想家（+ [[1901]]）
== Deaths == * [[大暦]]10th year（[[776]]） - {{仮リンク|新平公主|zh|新平公主 (唐朝)}}、[[玄宗 (唐)|玄宗]]の娘。
== Commemorations == * 朔旦冬至（この日が[[冬至]]の場合）

[[sn:November 1 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 1일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月1日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 1일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初一]] [[zh:十一月初一]] [[en:draft:November 1 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chōhō|ja|長保}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[999]] [[12月11日]] ） - [[藤原道長]] の娘・[[藤原彰子|彰子]] が入内{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[12月11日]] ） - [[薩摩藩]] が英公使に10万ドルを払い[[生麦事件]] が解決{{要出典|date=2021-03}}
== Births == * [[永禄]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1561]] [[12月7日]] ） - [[吉川広家]] 、[[周防国]] [[岩国領]] の初代領主（+ [[1625]] ） * [[建治]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1275]] [[11月19日]] ） - [[夢窓疎石]] 、[[臨済宗]] の僧（+ [[1351]] ） * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1847]] [[12月8日]] ） - [[中江兆民]] 、思想家（+ [[1901]] ）
== Deaths == * [[大暦]] 10th year（[[776]] ） - {{仮リンク|新平公主|zh|新平公主 (唐朝)}} 、[[玄宗 (唐)|玄宗]] の娘。
== Commemorations == * 朔旦冬至（この日が[[冬至]] の場合）
== See Also ==

== Deaths == * [[大暦]] 10th year（[[776]] ） - {{仮リンク|新平公主|zh|新平公主 (唐朝)}} 、[[玄宗 (唐)|玄宗]] の娘。
== Commemorations == * 朔旦冬至（この日が[[冬至]] の場合）

[[sn:November 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 1일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月1日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 1일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初一]] [[zh:十一月初一]] [[en:draft:November 1 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chōhō|ja|長保}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[999]] [[December 11]] ） - [[藤原道長]] の娘・[[藤原彰子|彰子]] が入内{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[December 11]] ） - [[薩摩藩]] が英公使に10万ドルを払い[[生麦事件]] が解決{{要出典|date=2021-03}}
== Births == * [[永禄]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1561]] [[December 7]] ） - [[吉川広家]] 、[[周防国]] [[岩国領]] の初代領主（+ [[1625]] ） * [[建治]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1275]] [[November 19]] ） - [[夢窓疎石]] 、[[臨済宗]] の僧（+ [[1351]] ） * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1847]] [[December 8]] ） - [[中江兆民]] 、思想家（+ [[1901]] ）
== Deaths == * [[大暦]] 10th year（[[776]] ） - {{仮リンク|新平公主|zh|新平公主 (唐朝)}} 、[[玄宗 (唐)|玄宗]] の娘。
== Commemorations == * 朔旦冬至（この日が[[冬至]] の場合）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|30|11|2|10|1|12|11|1101}} [[Category:removing this]] [[sn:10月29日 (旧暦)|10月29日]] 。

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chōhō|ja|長保}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[999]] [[December 11]] ） - [[Fujiwara no Michinaga]] の娘・[[藤原彰子|彰子]] が入内{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[December 11]] ） - [[Satsuma Domain]] が英公使に10万ドルを払い[[生麦事件]] が解決{{要出典|date=2021-03}}
== Births == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1561]] [[December 7]] ） - [[吉川広家]] 、[[Suō Province]] [[岩国領]] の初代領主（+ [[1625]] ） * [[Kenji]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1275]] [[November 19]] ） - [[夢窓疎石]] 、[[臨済宗]] のMonk（+ [[1351]] ） * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1847]] [[December 8]] ） - [[中江兆民]] 、Thinker（+ [[1901]] ）
== Deaths == * [[大暦]] 10th year（[[776]] ） - {{仮リンク|新平公主|zh|新平公主 (唐朝)}} 、[[玄宗 (唐)|玄宗]] の娘。
== Commemorations == * 朔旦冬至（この日が[[冬至]] の場合）

== Events == * {{ill|Chōhō|ja|長保}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[999]] [[December 11]] ） - [[Fujiwara no Michinaga]] の娘・[[藤原彰子|彰子]] が入内{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[December 11]] ） - [[Satsuma Domain]] が英公使に10万ドルを払い[[生麦事件]] が解決{{要出典|date=2021-03}}

== Deaths == * [[大暦]] 10th year（[[776]] ） - {{仮リンク|新平公主|zh|新平公主 (唐朝)}} 、[[玄宗 (唐)|玄宗]] の娘。

[[sn:November 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 1일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月1日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 1일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初一]] [[zh:十一月初一]] [[en:draft:November 1 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chōhō|ja|長保}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[999]] [[December 11]] ） - [[Fujiwara no Michinaga]] の娘・[[藤原彰子|彰子]] が入内{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[December 11]] ） - [[Satsuma Domain]] が英公使に10万ドルを払い[[生麦事件]] が解決{{要出典|date=2021-03}}
== Births == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1561]] [[December 7]] ） - [[吉川広家]] 、[[Suō Province]] [[岩国領]] の初代領主（+ [[1625]] ） * [[Kenji]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1275]] [[November 19]] ） - [[夢窓疎石]] 、[[臨済宗]] のMonk（+ [[1351]] ） * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1847]] [[December 8]] ） - [[中江兆民]] 、Thinker（+ [[1901]] ）
== Deaths == * [[大暦]] 10th year（[[776]] ） - {{仮リンク|新平公主|zh|新平公主 (唐朝)}} 、[[玄宗 (唐)|玄宗]] の娘。
== Commemorations == * 朔旦冬至（この日が[[冬至]] の場合）
== See Also ==

[[sn:November 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 1일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月1日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 1일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初一]] [[zh:十一月初一]] [[en:draft:November 1 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chōhō|ja|長保}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[999]] [[December 11]] ） - [[Fujiwara no Michinaga]] の娘・[[藤原彰子|彰子]] が入内{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[December 11]] ） - [[Satsuma Domain]] が英公使に10万ドルを払い[[生麦事件]] が解決{{要出典|date=2021-03}}
== Births == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1561]] [[December 7]] ） - [[吉川広家]] 、[[Suō Province]] [[岩国領]] の初代領主（+ [[1625]] ） * [[Kenji]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1275]] [[November 19]] ） - [[夢窓疎石]] 、[[臨済宗]] のMonk（+ [[1351]] ） * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1847]] [[December 8]] ） - [[中江兆民]] 、Thinker（+ [[1901]] ）
== Deaths == * [[大暦]] 10th year（[[776]] ） - {{仮リンク|新平公主|zh|新平公主 (唐朝)}} 、[[玄宗 (唐)|玄宗]] の娘。
== Commemorations == * 朔旦冬至（この日が[[冬至]] の場合）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|30|11|2|10|1|12|11|1101}} [[Category:removing this]] [[sn:10月29日 (旧暦)|10月29日]] 。
[[en:11月1日 (旧暦)]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:November 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 1일]] [[ja:11月1日 (旧暦)]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:November 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 1일]] [[Category:Lunisolar November]]
[[Category:Taian]] [[sn:November 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 1일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月1日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 1일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初一]] [[zh:十一月初一]] [[en:draft:November 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:Days 1 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[sn:November 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 1일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月1日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 1일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初一]] [[zh:十一月初一]] [[en:draft:November 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category: Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:November 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 1일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月1日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 1일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初一]] [[zh:十一月初一]] [[en:draft:November 1 (Lunisolar)]]

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初一]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chōhō|ja|長保}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[999]] [[December 11]] ） - [[Fujiwara no Michinaga]] の娘・[[藤原彰子|彰子]] が入内{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[December 11]] ） - [[Satsuma Domain]] が英公使に10万ドルを払い[[生麦事件]] が解決{{要出典|date=2021-03}}
== Births == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1561]] [[December 7]] ） - [[吉川広家]] 、[[Suō Province]] [[岩国領]] の初代領主（+ [[1625]] ） * [[Kenji]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1275]] [[November 19]] ） - [[夢窓疎石]] 、[[臨済宗]] のMonk（+ [[1351]] ） * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1847]] [[December 8]] ） - [[中江兆民]] 、Thinker（+ [[1901]] ）
== Deaths == * [[大暦]] 10th year（[[776]] ） - {{仮リンク|新平公主|zh|新平公主 (唐朝)}} 、[[玄宗 (唐)|玄宗]] の娘。
== Commemorations == * 朔旦冬至（この日が[[冬至]] の場合）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|30|11|2|10|1|12|11|1101}} 。
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初一]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初一]]
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初一]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}}
{{draft categories| [[Category:removing this]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar November]] [[Category:Taian]] [[Category:Days 1 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[sn:November 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 1일]] [[ja:11月1日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十一月初一]] [[en:draft:November 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:10月29日 (旧暦)|10月29日]] [[en:11月1日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:ovember 1 (Lunisolar)]]

[[cdo:1 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:一月初五]] {{Lunisolar January}} '''January 5''' is the 5th day of the month {{ill|Zhengyue|ja|January (Old Calendar)|lt=January}}, the 1st month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|Rokuyō}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|Taian}}.
== Events == * [[成務天皇]] 1st year （[[Julian calendar]] [[131]] [[February 18]]） – The 13th Emperor, [[成務天皇]], accedes to the throne. * [[仁賢天皇]] 1st year （[[Julian calendar]] [[488]] [[February 4]]） – The 24th Emperor, [[仁賢天皇]], accedes to the throne. * [[Emperor Tenmu]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[675]] [[February 8]]） – Emperor Tenmu establishes Japan’s first astronomical observatory to observe the heavens and divine auspicious omens. * [[Tenchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[824]] [[February 12]]） – The era name is changed from [[弘仁]] to Tenchō. * [[貞和]] 4th year /[[Shōhei]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1348]] [[February 4]]） – Kusunoki Masayuki, son of Kusunoki Masashige, is defeated in fierce fighting against General Takashi and commits suicide. * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] [[February 17]]） – Toyotomi Hideyoshi issues a mobilization order for an expedition, sending forces via Korea to Ming (the Imjin War). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1855]] [[February 21]]） – The Tokugawa shogunate ratifies and exchanges the treaty document of the Japan–US Treaty of Amity and Commerce with Ambassador Adams.
== Births == <!-- The Old Lunar and Gregorian calendars do not match --> * [[道光]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1823]] [[February 15]]） – Li Hongzhang, a politician of the Qing dynasty (d. [[1901]]). * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[February 22]]） – Tsuboi Shōgorō, a natural anthropologist (d. [[1913]]). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1867]] [[February 9]]） – Natsume Sōseki, a novelist (d. [[1916]]).
== Deaths == * [[貞和]] 4th year /[[Shōhei]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1348]] [[February 12]]） – Kusunoki Masayuki, a military commander and son of Kusunoki Masashige (born [[1326]]). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1580]] [[January 21]]） – Kitabatake Gufusa, the legitimate son of [[北畠具教]] (born [[1547]]). * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1593]] [[February 6]]） – Emperor Shōchin (正親町天皇), the 106th Emperor of Japan (born [[1517]]). * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1651]] [[February 24]]） – Mōri Hidezumi, the 2nd lord of the Chōshū Domain (born [[1595]]). * [[Bunka]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1804]] [[February 15]]） – Takahashi Shijirō, an astronomer and mentor to Ino Tadataka (born [[1764]]). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[January 29]]） – Inoue Genzaburō, commander of the 6th unit of the Shinsengumi (born [[1829]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[February 15]]） – Yokoi Konosuke, a Confucian scholar and thinker (born [[1809]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|1|4|1|6|12|5|2|1|0105}}
[[cdo:1 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:一月初五]] [[cdo:1 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:一月初五]]

revision.text:
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初一]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Chōhō|ja|長保|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[999]] [[December 11]]) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|藤原道長|12=draft}}’s daughter, {{ill|Akiko|ja|藤原彰子|12=draft}}, was received into court.{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1863]] [[December 11]]) – The {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩|12=draft}} paid 100,000 dollars to an English envoy, resolving the {{ill|Namamugi Incident|ja|生麦事件|12=draft}}.{{要出典|date=2021-03}}
== Births == * {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1561]] [[December 7]]) – {{ill|Yoshikawa Hiroie|ja|吉川広家|12=draft}}, the first lord of the {{ill|Suō Province|ja|周防国|12=draft}}’s {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領|12=draft}} (died [[1625]]). * {{ill|Kenji|ja|建治|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1275]] [[November 19]]) – {{ill|Musō Soseki|ja|夢窓疎石|12=draft}}, a monk of the {{ill|Rinzai Zen|ja|臨済宗|12=draft}} (died [[1351]]). * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1847]] [[December 8]]) – {{ill|Nakajima Chōmin|ja|中江兆民|12=draft}}, a thinker (died [[1901]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Daireki|ja|大暦|12=draft}} 10th year ([[776]]) – {{ill|Xinping Princess|ja|新平公主|zh|新平公主 (唐朝)|12=draft}}, daughter of {{ill|Emperor Xuanzong|ja|玄宗|zh|玄宗 (唐)|12=draft}}.
== Commemorations == * 朔旦冬至 (if this day coincides with the {{ill|Winter Solstice|ja|冬至|12=draft}})
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|30|11|2|10|1|12|11|1101}} {{!-- Remove any unwanted category link such as and the stray reference to . --}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月1日'''（きゅうれきじゅういちがつついたち）は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の1日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[長保]]元年（ユリウス暦[[999年]][[12月11日]]） - [[藤原道長]]の娘・[[藤原彰子|彰子]]が入内{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[文久]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1863年]][[12月11日]]） - [[薩摩藩]]が英公使に10万ドルを払い[[生麦事件]]が解決{{要出典|date=2021-03}}
== 誕生日 == * [[永禄]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1561年]][[12月7日]]） - [[吉川広家]]、[[周防国]][[岩国領]]の初代領主（+ [[1625年]]） * [[建治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1275年]][[11月19日]]） - [[夢窓疎石]]、[[臨済宗]]の僧（+ [[1351年]]） * [[弘化]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1847年]][[12月8日]]） - [[中江兆民]]、思想家（+ [[1901年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[大暦]]10年（[[776年]]） - {{仮リンク|新平公主|zh|新平公主 (唐朝)}}、[[玄宗 (唐)|玄宗]]の娘。
== 記念日・年中行事 == * 朔旦冬至（この日が[[冬至]]の場合）
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|30|11|2|10|1|12|11|1101}} ※ただし、[[小の月]]の前日は[[10月29日 (旧暦)|10月29日]]。

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月1日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 1일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月初一]][[zh:十一月初一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840273]] Wikidata name: 1st day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 1|qq=November 1}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 1일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Chōhō (era)|Chōhō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:999|999]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Michinaga|Fujiwara no Michinaga]]’s daughter, [[:en:Empress Shōshi|Akiko]], was received into court.{{Citation needed|date=2021-03}} * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – The [[:en:Satsuma Domain|Satsuma Domain]] paid 100,000 dollars to an English envoy, resolving the [[:en:Namamugi Incident|Namamugi Incident]].{{Citation needed|date=2021-03}}
== Births == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1561|1561]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]) – [[:en:Kikkawa Hiroie|Yoshikawa Hiroie]], the first lord of the [[:en:Suō Province|Suō Province]]’s {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwakuni Domain|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岩国藩|1=Iwakuni Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q839263}} (died [[:en:1625|1625]]). * [[:en:Kenji (era)|Kenji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1275|1275]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]]) – [[:en:Musō Soseki|Musō Soseki]], a monk of the [[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai Zen]] (died [[:en:1351|1351]]). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1847|1847]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]) – [[:en:Nakae Chōmin|Nakajima Chōmin]], a thinker (died [[:en:1901|1901]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Daireki|ja|大暦|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daireki|qq=|1=Dali|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10935673}} 10th year ([[:en:776|776]]) – {{ill|Xinping Princess|ja|新平公主|zh|新平公主 (唐朝)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinping Princess|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, daughter of {{ill|Emperor Xuanzong|ja|玄宗|zh|玄宗 (唐)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Xuanzong|qq=|1=Emperor Xuanzong|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572271}}. == Commemorations == * 朔旦冬至 (if this day coincides with the [[:en:Winter solstice|Winter Solstice]])
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|30|11|2|10|1|12|11|1101}} {{!-- Remove any unwanted category link such as and the stray reference to . --}}

== Events == * [[:en:Chōhō (era)|Chōhō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:999|999]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Michinaga|Fujiwara no Michinaga]]’s daughter, [[:en:Empress Shōshi|Akiko]], was received into court.{{Citation needed|date=2021-03}} * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – The [[:en:Satsuma Domain|Satsuma Domain]] paid 100,000 dollars to an English envoy, resolving the [[:en:Namamugi Incident|Namamugi Incident]].{{Citation needed|date=2021-03}}
== Births == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1561|1561]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]) – [[:en:Kikkawa Hiroie|Yoshikawa Hiroie]], the first lord of the [[:en:Suō Province|Suō Province]]’s {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwakuni Domain|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岩国藩|1=Iwakuni Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q839263}} (died [[:en:1625|1625]]). * [[:en:Kenji (era)|Kenji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1275|1275]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]]) – [[:en:Musō Soseki|Musō Soseki]], a monk of the [[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai Zen]] (died [[:en:1351|1351]]). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1847|1847]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]) – [[:en:Nakae Chōmin|Nakajima Chōmin]], a thinker (died [[:en:1901|1901]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Daireki|ja|大暦|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daireki|qq=|1=Dali|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10935673}} 10th year ([[:en:776|776]]) – {{ill|Xinping Princess|ja|新平公主|zh|新平公主 (唐朝)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinping Princess|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, daughter of {{ill|Emperor Xuanzong|ja|玄宗|zh|玄宗 (唐)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Xuanzong|qq=|1=Emperor Xuanzong|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572271}}. == Commemorations == * 朔旦冬至 (if this day coincides with the [[:en:Winter solstice|Winter Solstice]])

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月1日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 1일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月初一]][[zh:十一月初一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840273]] Wikidata name: 1st day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 1|qq=November 1}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 1일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Chōhō (era)|Chōhō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:999|999]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Michinaga|Fujiwara no Michinaga]]’s daughter, [[:en:Empress Shōshi|Akiko]], was received into court.{{Citation needed|date=2021-03}} * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – The [[:en:Satsuma Domain|Satsuma Domain]] paid 100,000 dollars to an English envoy, resolving the [[:en:Namamugi Incident|Namamugi Incident]].{{Citation needed|date=2021-03}}
== Births == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1561|1561]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]) – [[:en:Kikkawa Hiroie|Yoshikawa Hiroie]], the first lord of the [[:en:Suō Province|Suō Province]]’s {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwakuni Domain|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岩国藩|1=Iwakuni Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q839263}} (died [[:en:1625|1625]]). * [[:en:Kenji (era)|Kenji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1275|1275]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]]) – [[:en:Musō Soseki|Musō Soseki]], a monk of the [[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai Zen]] (died [[:en:1351|1351]]). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1847|1847]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]) – [[:en:Nakae Chōmin|Nakajima Chōmin]], a thinker (died [[:en:1901|1901]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Daireki|ja|大暦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daireki|1=Dali|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10935673}} 10th year ([[:en:776|776]]) – {{ill|Xinping Princess|ja|新平公主|zh|新平公主 (唐朝)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinping Princess|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, daughter of {{ill|Emperor Xuanzong|ja|玄宗|zh|玄宗 (唐)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Xuanzong|1=Emperor Xuanzong|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572271}}. == Commemorations == * 朔旦冬至 (if this day coincides with the [[:en:Winter solstice|Winter Solstice]])
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|30|11|2|10|1|12|11|1101}} {{!-- Remove any unwanted category link such as and the stray reference to . --}}

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 1일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Chōhō (era)|Chōhō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:999|999]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Michinaga|Fujiwara no Michinaga]]’s daughter, [[:en:Empress Shōshi|Akiko]], was received into court.{{Citation needed|date=2021-03}} * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – The [[:en:Satsuma Domain|Satsuma Domain]] paid 100,000 dollars to an English envoy, resolving the [[:en:Namamugi Incident|Namamugi Incident]].{{Citation needed|date=2021-03}}
== Births == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1561|1561]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]) – [[:en:Kikkawa Hiroie|Yoshikawa Hiroie]], the first lord of the [[:en:Suō Province|Suō Province]]’s {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwakuni Domain|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岩国藩|1=Iwakuni Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q839263}} (died [[:en:1625|1625]]). * [[:en:Kenji (era)|Kenji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1275|1275]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]]) – [[:en:Musō Soseki|Musō Soseki]], a monk of the [[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai Zen]] (died [[:en:1351|1351]]). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1847|1847]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]) – [[:en:Nakae Chōmin|Nakajima Chōmin]], a thinker (died [[:en:1901|1901]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Daireki|ja|大暦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daireki|1=Dali|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10935673}} 10th year ([[:en:776|776]]) – {{ill|Xinping Princess|ja|新平公主|zh|新平公主 (唐朝)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinping Princess|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, daughter of {{ill|Emperor Xuanzong|ja|玄宗|zh|玄宗 (唐)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Xuanzong|1=Emperor Xuanzong|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572271}}. == Commemorations == * 朔旦冬至 (if this day coincides with the [[:en:Winter solstice|Winter Solstice]])

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月1日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 1일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月初一]][[zh:十一月初一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840273]] Wikidata name: 1st day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 1|qq=November 1}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 1일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Chōhō (era)|Chōhō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:999|999]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Michinaga|Fujiwara no Michinaga]]’s daughter, [[:en:Empress Shōshi|Akiko]], was received into court.{{Citation needed|date=2021-03}} * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – The [[:en:Satsuma Domain|Satsuma Domain]] paid 100,000 dollars to an English envoy, resolving the [[:en:Namamugi Incident|Namamugi Incident]].{{Citation needed|date=2021-03}}
== Births == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1561|1561]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]) – [[:en:Kikkawa Hiroie|Yoshikawa Hiroie]], the first lord of the [[:en:Suō Province|Suō Province]]’s {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwakuni Domain|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岩国藩|1=Iwakuni Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q839263}} (died [[:en:1625|1625]]). * [[:en:Kenji (era)|Kenji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1275|1275]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]]) – [[:en:Musō Soseki|Musō Soseki]], a monk of the [[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai Zen]] (died [[:en:1351|1351]]). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1847|1847]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]) – [[:en:Nakae Chōmin|Nakajima Chōmin]], a thinker (died [[:en:1901|1901]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Daireki|ja|大暦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daireki|1=Dali|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10935673}} 10th year ([[:en:776|776]]) – {{ill|Xinping Princess|ja|新平公主|zh|新平公主 (唐朝)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinping Princess|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, daughter of {{ill|Emperor Xuanzong|ja|玄宗|zh|玄宗 (唐)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Xuanzong|1=Emperor Xuanzong|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572271}}. == Commemorations == * 朔旦冬至 (if this day coincides with the [[:en:Winter solstice|Winter Solstice]])

== Deaths == * {{ill|Daireki|ja|大暦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daireki|1=Dali|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10935673}} 10th year ([[:en:776|776]]) – {{ill|Xinping Princess|ja|新平公主|zh|新平公主 (唐朝)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinping Princess|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, daughter of {{ill|Emperor Xuanzong|ja|玄宗|zh|玄宗 (唐)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Xuanzong|1=Emperor Xuanzong|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572271}}. == Commemorations == * 朔旦冬至 (if this day coincides with the [[:en:Winter solstice|Winter Solstice]])

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月1日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 1일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月初一]][[zh:十一月初一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月1日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 1일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月初一]][[zh:十一月初一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月1日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 1일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月初一]][[zh:十一月初一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840273]] Wikidata name: 1st day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 1|qq=November 1}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 1일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Chōhō (era)|Chōhō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:999|999]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Michinaga|Fujiwara no Michinaga]]’s daughter, [[:en:Empress Shōshi|Akiko]], was received into court.{{Citation needed|date=2021-03}} * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – The [[:en:Satsuma Domain|Satsuma Domain]] paid 100,000 dollars to an English envoy, resolving the [[:en:Namamugi Incident|Namamugi Incident]].{{Citation needed|date=2021-03}}
== Births == * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1561|1561]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]) – [[:en:Kikkawa Hiroie|Yoshikawa Hiroie]], the first lord of the [[:en:Suō Province|Suō Province]]’s {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwakuni Domain|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岩国藩|1=Iwakuni Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q839263}} (died [[:en:1625|1625]]). * [[:en:Kenji (era)|Kenji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1275|1275]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]]) – [[:en:Musō Soseki|Musō Soseki]], a monk of the [[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai Zen]] (died [[:en:1351|1351]]). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1847|1847]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]) – [[:en:Nakae Chōmin|Nakajima Chōmin]], a thinker (died [[:en:1901|1901]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Daireki|ja|大暦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daireki|1=Dali|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10935673}} 10th year ([[:en:776|776]]) – {{ill|Xinping Princess|ja|新平公主|zh|新平公主 (唐朝)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinping Princess|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, daughter of {{ill|Emperor Xuanzong|ja|玄宗|zh|玄宗 (唐)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Xuanzong|1=Emperor Xuanzong|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572271}}. == Commemorations == * 朔旦冬至 (if this day coincides with the [[:en:Winter solstice|Winter Solstice]])

== Events == * {{ill|Chōhō (era)|en|Chōhō (era)|WD=Q1324844|lt=Chōhō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|999|en|999|WD=Q277307|lt=999}} {{ill|December 11|en|December 11|WD=Q2363|lt=December 11}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|en|Fujiwara no Michinaga|WD=Q433133|lt=Fujiwara no Michinaga}}’s daughter, {{ill|Empress Shōshi|en|Empress Shōshi|WD=Q901949|lt=Akiko}}, was received into court.{{Citation needed|date=2021-03}} * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1863|en|1863|WD=Q7701|lt=1863}} {{ill|December 11|en|December 11|WD=Q2363|lt=December 11}}) – The {{ill|Satsuma Domain|en|Satsuma Domain|WD=Q676187|lt=Satsuma Domain}} paid 100,000 dollars to an English envoy, resolving the {{ill|Namamugi Incident|en|Namamugi Incident|WD=Q546075|lt=Namamugi Incident}}.{{Citation needed|date=2021-03}}
== Births == * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1561|en|1561|WD=Q6618|lt=1561}} {{ill|December 7|en|December 7|WD=Q2299|lt=December 7}}) – {{ill|Kikkawa Hiroie|en|Kikkawa Hiroie|WD=Q1049766|lt=Yoshikawa Hiroie}}, the first lord of the {{ill|Suō Province|en|Suō Province|WD=Q1053037|lt=Suō Province}}’s {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwakuni Domain|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岩国藩|1=Iwakuni Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q839263}} (died {{ill|1625|en|1625|WD=Q6826|lt=1625}}). * {{ill|Kenji (era)|en|Kenji (era)|WD=Q1327993|lt=Kenji}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1275|en|1275|WD=Q5529|lt=1275}} {{ill|November 19|en|November 19|WD=Q3026|lt=November 19}}) – {{ill|Musō Soseki|en|Musō Soseki|WD=Q384703|lt=Musō Soseki}}, a monk of the {{ill|Rinzai school|en|Rinzai school|WD=Q639625|lt=Rinzai Zen}} (died {{ill|1351|en|1351|WD=Q6104|lt=1351}}). * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|WD=Q1325317|lt=Kōka}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1847|en|1847|WD=Q7644|lt=1847}} {{ill|December 8|en|December 8|WD=Q2301|lt=December 8}}) – {{ill|Nakae Chōmin|en|Nakae Chōmin|WD=Q2972146|lt=Nakajima Chōmin}}, a thinker (died {{ill|1901|en|1901|WD=Q2035|lt=1901}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Daireki|ja|大暦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daireki|1=Dali|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10935673}} 10th year ({{ill|776|en|776|WD=Q30690|lt=776}}) – {{ill|Xinping Princess|ja|新平公主|zh|新平公主 (唐朝)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinping Princess|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, daughter of {{ill|Emperor Xuanzong|ja|玄宗|zh|玄宗 (唐)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Xuanzong|1=Emperor Xuanzong|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572271}}. == Commemorations == * 朔旦冬至 (if this day coincides with the {{ill|Winter solstice|en|Winter solstice|WD=Q207932|lt=Winter Solstice}})

== Births == * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1561|en|1561|WD=Q6618|lt=1561}} {{ill|December 7|en|December 7|WD=Q2299|lt=December 7}}) – {{ill|Kikkawa Hiroie|en|Kikkawa Hiroie|WD=Q1049766|lt=Yoshikawa Hiroie}}, the first lord of the {{ill|Suō Province|en|Suō Province|WD=Q1053037|lt=Suō Province}}’s {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwakuni Domain|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岩国藩|1=Iwakuni Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q839263}} (died {{ill|1625|en|1625|WD=Q6826|lt=1625}}). * {{ill|Kenji (era)|en|Kenji (era)|WD=Q1327993|lt=Kenji}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1275|en|1275|WD=Q5529|lt=1275}} {{ill|November 19|en|November 19|WD=Q3026|lt=November 19}}) – {{ill|Musō Soseki|en|Musō Soseki|WD=Q384703|lt=Musō Soseki}}, a monk of the {{ill|Rinzai school|en|Rinzai school|WD=Q639625|lt=Rinzai Zen}} (died {{ill|1351|en|1351|WD=Q6104|lt=1351}}). * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|WD=Q1325317|lt=Kōka}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1847|en|1847|WD=Q7644|lt=1847}} {{ill|December 8|en|December 8|WD=Q2301|lt=December 8}}) – {{ill|Nakae Chōmin|en|Nakae Chōmin|WD=Q2972146|lt=Nakajima Chōmin}}, a thinker (died {{ill|1901|en|1901|WD=Q2035|lt=1901}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Daireki|ja|大暦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daireki|1=Dali|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10935673}} 10th year ({{ill|776|en|776|WD=Q30690|lt=776}}) – {{ill|Xinping Princess|ja|新平公主|zh|新平公主 (唐朝)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinping Princess|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, daughter of {{ill|Emperor Xuanzong|ja|玄宗|zh|玄宗 (唐)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Xuanzong|1=Emperor Xuanzong|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572271}}. == Commemorations == * 朔旦冬至 (if this day coincides with the {{ill|Winter solstice|en|Winter solstice|WD=Q207932|lt=Winter Solstice}})

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Chōhō (era)|en|Chōhō (era)|WD=Q1324844|lt=Chōhō|1=Chōhō (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|999|en|999|WD=Q277307|lt=999|1=999}} {{ill|December 11|en|December 11|WD=Q2363|lt=December 11|1=December 11}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|en|Fujiwara no Michinaga|WD=Q433133|lt=Fujiwara no Michinaga|1=Fujiwara no Michinaga}}’s daughter, {{ill|Empress Shōshi|en|Empress Shōshi|WD=Q901949|lt=Akiko|1=Empress Shōshi}}, was received into court.{{Citation needed|date=2021-03}} * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|WD=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1863|en|1863|WD=Q7701|lt=1863|1=1863}} {{ill|December 11|en|December 11|WD=Q2363|lt=December 11|1=December 11}}) – The {{ill|Satsuma Domain|en|Satsuma Domain|WD=Q676187|lt=Satsuma Domain|1=Satsuma Domain}} paid 100,000 dollars to an English envoy, resolving the {{ill|Namamugi Incident|en|Namamugi Incident|WD=Q546075|lt=Namamugi Incident|1=Namamugi Incident}}.{{Citation needed|date=2021-03}}
== Births == * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1561|en|1561|WD=Q6618|lt=1561|1=1561}} {{ill|December 7|en|December 7|WD=Q2299|lt=December 7|1=December 7}}) – {{ill|Kikkawa Hiroie|en|Kikkawa Hiroie|WD=Q1049766|lt=Yoshikawa Hiroie|1=Kikkawa Hiroie}}, the first lord of the {{ill|Suō Province|en|Suō Province|WD=Q1053037|lt=Suō Province|1=Suō Province}}’s {{ill|Iwakuni Domain|ja|岩国領|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwakuni Domain|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岩国藩|1=Iwakuni Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q839263}} (died {{ill|1625|en|1625|WD=Q6826|lt=1625|1=1625}}). * {{ill|Kenji (era)|en|Kenji (era)|WD=Q1327993|lt=Kenji|1=Kenji (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1275|en|1275|WD=Q5529|lt=1275|1=1275}} {{ill|November 19|en|November 19|WD=Q3026|lt=November 19|1=November 19}}) – {{ill|Musō Soseki|en|Musō Soseki|WD=Q384703|lt=Musō Soseki|1=Musō Soseki}}, a monk of the {{ill|Rinzai school|en|Rinzai school|WD=Q639625|lt=Rinzai Zen|1=Rinzai school}} (died {{ill|1351|en|1351|WD=Q6104|lt=1351|1=1351}}). * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|WD=Q1325317|lt=Kōka|1=Kōka}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1847|en|1847|WD=Q7644|lt=1847|1=1847}} {{ill|December 8|en|December 8|WD=Q2301|lt=December 8|1=December 8}}) – {{ill|Nakae Chōmin|en|Nakae Chōmin|WD=Q2972146|lt=Nakajima Chōmin|1=Nakae Chōmin}}, a thinker (died {{ill|1901|en|1901|WD=Q2035|lt=1901|1=1901}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Daireki|ja|大暦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daireki|1=Dali|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10935673}} 10th year ({{ill|776|en|776|WD=Q30690|lt=776|1=776}}) – {{ill|Xinping Princess|ja|新平公主|zh|新平公主 (唐朝)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinping Princess|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, daughter of {{ill|Emperor Xuanzong|ja|玄宗|zh|玄宗 (唐)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Xuanzong|1=Emperor Xuanzong|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11572271}}. == Commemorations == * 朔旦冬至 (if this day coincides with the {{ill|Winter solstice|en|Winter solstice|WD=Q207932|lt=Winter Solstice|1=Winter solstice}})
